# Payslip Insights

> Payslip Insights (formerly PayCheck) helps employees in 10 countries understand their payslips, track month-to-month changes, and catch payroll mistakes early. Coverage: UK, Ireland, US (all 50 states), Germany, France, Netherlands, Spain, Italy, Belgium, Portugal.

We provide plain-English guides, free take-home pay calculators, and a paid product that ingests your monthly payslips, runs anomaly detection, and drafts payroll queries when something looks wrong.

This is not tax, legal, or payroll advice — we surface issues for you to confirm with your employer or a qualified professional.

## Country payslip guides

- [UK Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/uk-payslip-guide): Tax codes, National Insurance, pension, student loan, and how to read a UK payslip.
- [Ireland Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/ireland-payslip-guide): PAYE, PRSI, USC, and tax credits explained for Irish employees.
- [US Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/us-payslip-guide): Federal Withholding, FICA-OASDI, FICA-HI, state withholding, 401(k)/HSA/FSA pre-tax deductions, and how to read ADP/Gusto/Paychex stubs.
- [Germany Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/germany-payslip-guide): Lohnsteuer, Solidaritätszuschlag, Kirchensteuer, and Sozialversicherung (KV/RV/AV/PV).
- [France Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/france-payslip-guide): Prélèvement à la source, cotisations sociales, AGIRC-ARRCO, CSG/CRDS.
- [Netherlands Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/netherlands-payslip-guide): Loonheffing, premies volksverzekeringen, pensioen, vakantiegeld.
- [Spain Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/spain-payslip-guide): IRPF, Seguridad Social, base de cotización, pagas extras.
- [Italy Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/italy-payslip-guide): IRPEF, addizionali regionali/comunali, INPS, TFR.
- [Belgium Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/belgium-payslip-guide): Bedrijfsvoorheffing/précompte professionnel, RSZ/ONSS, special contribution.
- [Portugal Payslip Guide](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/portugal-payslip-guide): IRS retenção na fonte, Segurança Social (TSU), subsídios, IRS Jovem.

## Topic guides

- [How to check your payslip](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/how-to-check-your-payslip): The 5-minute monthly check that catches most errors.
- [Why did my net pay go down?](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/why-did-my-net-pay-go-down): The most common reasons take-home pay drops month to month.
- [Common payslip mistakes](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/common-payslip-mistakes): Tax-code errors, missing pension, wrong NI category, and more.
- [Compare two payslips](https://payslipinsights.com/guides/compare-two-payslips): How to do a line-by-line comparison and what to flag.

## Free calculators

- [Calculator hub](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator): Pick a country to estimate take-home pay.
- [UK take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/uk)
- [Ireland take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/ireland)
- [US take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/us): Supports all 50 states + DC, single/married/head-of-household filing status.
- [Germany take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/germany)
- [France take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/france)
- [Netherlands take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/netherlands)
- [Spain take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/spain)
- [Italy take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/italy)
- [Belgium take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/belgium)
- [Portugal take-home calculator](https://payslipinsights.com/calculator/portugal)

## Product

- [Pricing](https://payslipinsights.com/pricing): Free tier and paid plans.
- [Sign up](https://payslipinsights.com/sign-up): Create an account and upload your first payslip.
